summary: Run 1: Duration constants+state+onBlur+hint (6 INFO). Run 2: UX WARN fixes — textMuted hint, fontSize 11, aria-describedby, durNote clamp alert; 385/385 pass.

findings.claim: TEST-REVIEW.md finding #1/#2: min={1} and no max — backend taskUpdateSchema min(5)/max(480) not reflected
findings.evidence: Added export var DUR_MIN = 5 and export var DUR_MAX = 480 at lines 26-29 with schema citation comment; applied as min={DUR_MIN} max={DUR_MAX} on the input

findings.claim: TEST-REVIEW.md finding #3: Math.max(1, parseInt||1) snaps controlled value mid-keystroke; no local display state
findings.evidence: Added durDraftState=React.useState(String(dur)), durDraft/setDurDraft destructure, and React.useEffect(fn,[dur]) sync at top of WhenSection body (lines 202-205)

findings.claim: TEST-REVIEW.md finding #4: label text is 'Duration' with no unit indicator
findings.evidence: Label text changed to 'Duration (min)' at line 296

findings.claim: TEST-REVIEW.md finding #5/#3: no onBlur handler; no local draft state; snap-to-1 on empty
findings.evidence: Replaced entire Duration input: value={durDraft}, onChange free-types draft + conditionally commits valid in-range integers, onBlur clamps parseInt(durDraft) to [DUR_MIN,DUR_MAX] and calls onDurChange+onEndTimeChange, onKeyDown Enter->blur (lines 297-321)

findings.claim: TEST-REVIEW.md finding #6: no visible range hint
findings.evidence: Added range hint span; subsequently updated in run 2 (dur-ux-001)

findings.claim: UX-REVIEW.md WARN-1: range hint uses TH.amberText — amber is reserved for error/caution states in this component; passive guidance must use muted color
findings.evidence: Changed color on range hint span from TH.amberText to TH.textMuted at line 330; key verified in THEME_DARK (#8A8070) and THEME_LIGHT (#5C5A55)

findings.claim: UX-REVIEW.md WARN-2: fontSize:9 below brand-minimum readable text size for UI guidance
findings.evidence: Changed fontSize on range hint span from 9 to 11 at line 330

findings.claim: UX-REVIEW.md WARN-3: range hint not programmatically linked to duration input; AT users do not hear range on focus (WCAG 1.3.1)
findings.evidence: Added aria-describedby="dur-range-hint" to input at line 328; added id="dur-range-hint" to hint span at line 330

findings.claim: UX-REVIEW.md WARN-4: blur-clamp correction is silent — value changes with no explanation to the user
findings.evidence: Added durNote state (lines 207-209); setDurNote('') in onChange (line 308); typed/note detection in onBlur (lines 324-325): if parseInt(durDraft) is out of [DUR_MIN,DUR_MAX] sets 'Adjusted to 5–480 min range' else clears; amber role=alert div rendered at line 331 when durNote non-empty
